description: Cloud Elements is an API integration platform that provides unified connectors (“elements”) to third-party SaaS services. It lets customers provision and use integration instances for services such as ecommerce platforms like Ecwid.
summary: Cloud Elements exposes a documented HTTP API surface for its Ecwid element on `https://api.cloud-elements.com/elements/api-v2`, authenticated via a compound Cloud Elements authorization header carrying an element token and user secret.
